tagline: Jobs ranked for you, not just filtered

landing.heroTitle: Find jobs that actually match your CV.
landing.heroSubtitle: AI-powered job discovery across Bulgaria, Romania, and international markets. Upload your CV and get ranked opportunities with match scores, skill gaps, and clear explanations.
landing.how1Text: PDF or DOCX — the AI reads it like a recruiter would.
landing.how2Text: Skills, experience, languages, and career direction, extracted and editable.
landing.how3Text: Every job gets a match score with a clear explanation of why it fits.
landing.how4Text: See skill gaps before you apply and focus on the roles worth your time.
landing.feat1Text: A relevance percentage for every job, not a keyword lottery.
landing.feat2Text: “Sales” also finds account managers and sales representatives.
landing.feat3Text: Every score comes with the why, in plain language.
landing.feat4Text: Know which skills would make you a stronger candidate.
landing.feat5Text: Bulgarian CV, English job ad — the AI matches across languages.
landing.feat6Text: Separate profiles for remote roles, relocation, or specific cities.
landing.ctaText: See why each role fits and what skills you may be missing.
landing.footer: JobMatch AI — AI-based matching between candidates and job ads.

onboarding.step1Subtitle: Pick anything that applies — all optional, you can change it later.
onboarding.step2Subtitle: Upload your CV and we’ll extract your skills, experience, languages, location, and preferred roles.
onboarding.extractNote: We extract: Skills · Experience · Education · Languages · Location · Career direction
onboarding.parsing: The AI is reading your CV…
onboarding.step3Subtitle: This is what the AI understood. Edit anything that’s off — matching quality depends on it.

dashboard.subGreeting: You have {n} new job matches this week.
dashboard.missingSkillsHint: Most requested in your top matches that your profile doesn’t have yet.

suggestions.addSkills: Add more skills — 5 or more sharpens matching.
suggestions.addWorkTypes: Set preferred work types (remote / hybrid / on-site).
suggestions.addSalary: Add salary expectations to improve matching.
suggestions.addCities: Add preferred cities to receive more accurate matches.

upload.title: Upload your CV
upload.hint: PDF, DOCX or TXT — the AI builds your profile from it.

profile.title: Your AI profile
profile.editHint: Comma-separated lists for skills, roles, languages and cities

filters.title: Filters
filters.search: Semantic search — “sales” also finds account managers…

results.title: Recommended for your profile
results.subtitle: Ranked by match score, not just keywords.
results.emptyHint: Try lowering your minimum match score or expanding your preferred locations.

job.explaining: The AI is analyzing the match…
job.gapPositive: You already match most requirements. Closing these gaps would improve your match.

searches.title: Saved Searches
searches.subtitle: Create separate searches for remote roles, relocation, or specific cities.
searches.emptyHint: Save your filters on the Job Matches page to create reusable search profiles.

errors.noBackend: Cannot reach the backend at {url}. Is it running?
